rationale: Fix is genuinely COMMENT-ONLY across all 3 approve files: git diff 8b664359..196f07d2 changes only lines inside `//` comments in impl.go, impl_test.go, and orphan_gate_test.go. No executable line, no test assertion altered; TestApproveImpl_NoCommitsNoBeads's body/assertions are untouched. R7's two findings are addressed truthfully: (1) the NoCommitsNoBeads comment no longer claims the zero-commit refusal is reachable via a valid plan — it now correctly states Leg 3 intercepts the missing-plan state before the preflight. I verified the logic: readPlanBeadIDs errors on empty bead_ids (impl.go:540-542), so len(beadIDs)==0 ⟺ planErr!=nil; runOrphanObligationGate (Leg 3, line 369) runs before the CommitCount preflight (435) and refuses on planErr!=nil (614) — the disjunction at :437 is thus always false past the gate, exactly as the new comment says. (2) The stale citation is fixed: grep confirms MergeBase is at impl.go:294, and :249 is honestly preserved as the pre-115 Fact-1 pin. go build ./... and go test -count=1 ./internal/approve both green (10.6s). My round-1 author-of-record APPROVE (all four legs, 11 tests, AC4) is undisturbed.

findings.note: Comment-only confirmed: diff restricted to `//` comment lines; preflight logic (impl.go:435-437), test assertions, and all four legs byte-identical to round 1.

R7 finding 1 addressed: Leg-3-subsumption claim is truthful — readPlanBeadIDs errors on empty bead_ids (:540), Leg 3 refuses on planErr!=nil (:614) before the preflight (:435), so the disjunction is always false in normal flow. Comment now matches reality.
R7 finding 2 addressed: MergeBase citation corrected to impl.go:294 (grep-verified); :249 retained and labeled as the spec's pre-115 Fact-1 pin, distinguished not conflated.
